metadata.name: smoke-echo-text-expected-keys
metadata.description: Minimal script-class specialist demonstrating execution.expected_output_keys: ships a JSON contract inline in task_template, runs as response_format:text (consumer parses), and uses expected_output_keys to catch hallucinated key sets server-side.

prompt.task_template:
Summarize the following text and produce controlled tags.

Return ONLY a JSON object of shape:
{
  "summary": "<one-sentence summary>",
  "tags": ["<short-tag-1>", "<short-tag-2>"]
}

No prose, no markdown fences.

Text:
$content
